content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 13, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development focused on finalizing the Eliza Cloud Apps (Product 2) infrastructure. Key achievements include arming the apps daemon, resolving critical database deprovisioning leaks, and stabilizing the staging environment. Additionally, production authentication issues were successfully resolved, restoring full functionality for Steward login services.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Apps Infrastructure & Deployment**
*   Enabled `APPS_DEPLOY_ENABLED` on staging and implemented idempotent arming scripts for the apps daemon to avoid manual SSH intervention ([#8406](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8406), [#8397](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8397), [#8398](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8398)).
*   Improved security by fetching tenant DSNs from shared state rather than dispatch inputs ([#8404](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8404)).
*   Fixed permission errors during daemon arming by routing environment file operations through sudo ([#8405](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8405)).

**Database & Resource Management**
*   Resolved a critical leak where deleted apps with isolated databases failed to drop Postgres instances or release cluster slots ([#8401](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8401)).
*   Fixed Terraform lockfile issues by adding missing `linux_amd64` provider hashes to `apps-shared` ([#8402](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8402)).
*   Introduced a one-shot workflow to remove orphaned state entries, ensuring clean Terraform plan/apply cycles ([#8400](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8400)).

**Testing & Quality Assurance**
*   Added 50 characterization tests for the agent warm-pool decision engine to ensure reliable container readiness ([#8403](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8403)).
*   Refined local runtime state management and suppressed debug log spam ([#8263](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8263)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#8407](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8407): feat(cloud-apps): arm build-from-repo on the daemon (the Vercel-like path).

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES

**[#8257](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8257) Steward login broken in prod**
*   **Status:** Resolved.
*   **Progress:** Following the implementation of PKCE support and the configuration of tenant redirect allowlists, production login functionality has been verified. Both Google OAuth and email magic-link flows are returning successful responses (302 and 200 respectively). The team recommends closing the issue pending a final manual sign-in confirmation.

**[#8321](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8321) Eliza Cloud Apps: scaling + ingress gaps**
*   **Status:** Near completion.
*   **Progress:** The apps data plane is built, armed, and verified on staging. The infrastructure is now split into `apps-shared` (network/DB) and `data-plane` (nodes/DNS). The remaining blockers for full go-live are minor: flipping the `join_mode` to 'open' for the staging tenant and enabling the build-from-repo path via registry configuration.
